nl_query: Which faculty members have prepared answer keys for papers where they are also assigned as the board coordinator, creating a potential conflict of interest?
failed_sql:
SELECT fc.employee_id, fc.name AS preparer_name, bc.employee_id AS coordinator_employee_id, fc2.name AS coordinator_name
FROM faculty_cache fc
JOIN answer_key_preparer akp ON akp.employee_id = fc.employee_id
JOIN answer_key ak ON ak.id = akp.answer_key_id
JOIN board_coordinator bc ON bc.employee_id = akp.employee_id
JOIN board bc2 ON bc2.id = ak.qp_id
WHERE fc.employee_id = bc2.board_coordinator_id
  AND fc.employee_id = bc2.evaluator_id
  AND bc2.status = 'EVAL_IN_PROGRESS'
  AND fc.is_active = TRUE
  AND bc2.is_active = TRUE
ORDER BY fc.name, bc2.name;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): board.name, board.is_active, board.board_coordinator_id, board.evaluator_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
